description: Make your runs easier and lighter with these Boris trainers from adidas. With its lightweight features, your running is guaranteed to be fast and comfortable.UpperMesh uppers with synthetic overlays for lightweight durability and breathabilityCushioned tongue and collar for extra comfortLace-ups for snug FitThree synthetic overlays across the sides signifying brand motto of performance, perseverance and achievementOutsole extended onto the toe box and embedded onto it for better protection of the forefootBrand name embroidered on the tongue and behind collarMidsoleCushioned footbed for all day step-in comfortFull length phylon midsole for lightweight cushioningOutsoleBlown rubber outsole for lightweight motion controlOutsole with arrow shaped lugs on the forefoot for better grip and tractionFlex grooves for better flexibility of the feetToe guard for longer shoe life and protection to the forefootErgonomic scoop for extra comfort to the midfoot archShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
